description: Log a completed maintenance inspection for a specific drone in the Aerobridge system (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using credentials 'admin' / 'adminpass123'. Identify the aircraft requiring maintenance from /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_task_info.txt. Log a new 'Maintenance' activity named '100-Hour Scheduled Inspection' for that aircraft with the current date/time and a 'Completed' status. Create a text file at /home/ga/Documents/activity_confirmation.txt containing the text: 'Activity logged for aircraft: <Identifier>', replacing <Identifier> with the aircraft name/serial found in the task info file.
